Districts of Donetsk on the territory of the Donetsk City Municipality:

|  |  |
| --- | --- |
| Budonivskyi District  Voroshylovskyi District  Kalininskyi District  Kyivskyi District  Kirovskyi District | Kuibyshevskyi District  Leninskyi District  Petrovskyi District  Proletarskyi District |

**Leninskyi District** ([Ukrainian](/wiki/Ukrainian_language "Ukrainian language"): Ленінський район) is an urban district of [Donetsk](/wiki/Donetsk "Donetsk"), [Ukraine](/wiki/Ukraine "Ukraine"), named after a Soviet political figure [Vladimir Lenin](/wiki/Vladimir_Lenin "Vladimir Lenin").

It was created in 1937 as the Factory-Stalin Raion.
